content: Better Auth OAuth + email-password pitfalls: (1) Asymmetric account linking — OAuth-first users cannot later add email/password (bug reported in v1.3.7, still present in some 1.6.x scenarios); linkSocial/setPassword APIs work but require explicit calls. (2) Email casing mismatch — GitHub/Google may return JohnDoe@email.com while DB has johndoe@email.com; Better Auth performs case-sensitive match causing duplicate user creation (issue #7806). (3) GitHub private email — must include user:email scope but primary email still returns null on /user endpoint; must call /user/emails. (4) Google refresh token one-time issue — only issued on first consent; repeated OAuth flows return only access token. (5) baseURL redirect_uri_mismatch — must set baseURL explicitly or callbacks default to localhost in production. (6) Security: auto-linking without verification enables account takeover; require email-verified flag from provider before linking.
